summary: Decentralized AI Compute Network for Consumer Hardware

summary: Self-hosted AI assistant & bot platform — streaming chat with local or cloud LLMs (Ollama/llama.cpp/IPEX-LLM for Intel Arc), image generation, TTS/STT, RAG + MCP, and autonomous Telegram, Matrix, Misskey & Pleroma bots. FastAPI +   SQLite, single-admin multi-user.

title: bug-ops/zeph

title: devthedeveloper/archi
summary: A software architect that knows your codebase. archi init learns your repo, archi design outputs plans + Mermaid diagrams grounded in it. Go, zero deps.

title: phuetz/code-buddy

Opt-in, human-gated evolutionary self-improvement that ingests research to set its own goals. 15 LLM providers (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Grok), ~110 tools, MCP, voice+vision companion.

title: Bike4Mind/bike4mind
summary: The open-core AI workbench — notebooks, agents, RAG, voice, and images across any model: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, or local via Ollama/vLLM. BSL 1.1,  auto-converting to Apache-2.0 on a two-year clock. Your AI keeps running when theirs doesn't.
